stemHtml: What is the required navigation performance for RNP 4 operations?

options.a: Plus or minus 4 NM on a 95% containment basis.
options.b: Plus or minus 4 miles on a 90% containment basis.
options.c: Plus or minus 4 NM on a 90% containment basis.
options.d: Plus or minus 4 NM on a 98% containment basis.
